description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical black cup filled with a white, creamy milkshake that rises slightly above the rim. A small flag, resembling the national flag of Chile with a blue square, white star, and red and white stripes, is attached to a thin stick and inserted into the milkshake. The cup appears to be made of a smooth, opaque material, likely plastic or coated paper, and has a simple, modern design with no visible branding or text. The milkshake is topped with a thick, foamy layer, giving it a rich and inviting appearance. The flag adds a decorative and festive touch, making the drink stand out in an urban setting.
description: A tall black cup filled with a white milkshake, topped with foam and decorated with a small Chilean flag on a stick.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full cup, white milkshake topping, and the Chilean flag clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view with the flag partially obscured by the milkshake, showing the cup's cylindrical shape.
description_view_2: Rear view with the flag angled away, highlighting the smooth, unadorned back of the cup.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the flag from behind and the milkshake's foamy top.
